entity.name: AppEmployee

boolean.name: advanceManagement
boolean.help: By enabling this configuration, you will be able to manage expense advances.

boolean.name: payrollPreparation
boolean.title: Payroll preparation
boolean.help: By enabling this configuration, you will be able to manage payroll preparation. A dedicated menu will appear in the employee management module.

boolean.name: lunchVoucher
boolean.title: Lunch Voucher
boolean.help: By enabling this configuration, you will be able to manage lunch vouchers. A dedicated menu will appear in the employee management module.

boolean.name: employeeBonus
boolean.title: Employee bonus
boolean.help: By enabling this configuration, you will be able to manage employee bonuses. A dedicated menu will appear in the employee management module.

boolean.name: isMyHrEnabled
boolean.title: Enable MyHR
boolean.help: Enabling MyHR activates an HR portal for employees, with menu entries giving them direct access to their HR data such as leave requests, expenses, timesheets, etc.

boolean.name: isMedicalVisitEnabled
boolean.title: Medical visit
boolean.help: By enabling this configuration, you will be able to manage employee medical visits. A dedicated tab will appear on the employee form.

entity.extra-code: public static final Integer INVOICING_LOG_TIMES_LINE_ACTIVITY = 1; public static final Integer INVOICING_LOG_TIMES_EMPLOYEE_ACTIVITY = 2;
